  -- Use the fact that Euc ℝ 3 is a Borel space to deduce that Torus3 is a Borel space
  have h : BorelSpace (Euc ℝ 3) := by
    -- Euc ℝ 3 is a Borel space because it is a finite-dimensional real vector space

  exact h
